author: GOqH
content: Resolved all 94 pedantic clippy warnings across the workspace. cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0; 92/92 tests pass; cargo fmt --check clean. Specific-lint allows added with one-line justifications where the suggestion was genuinely worse (cast_possible_truncation bounded by MAX_FRAME_SIZE, unused_async on test fixture, similar_names labels_a/labels_b and repo_a_dir/repo_b_dir, too_many_lines on linear narrative test). No public API or wire protocol changes.
